positive: A sophisticated, symmetrical illustration of cosmic botanicals and ethereal celestial fauna, set against a deep void background. The style must be high-contrast neo-tribal geometric etching, resembling a complex, stylized mandalic tapestry. The main elements—such as swirling nebulae forming root structures, stylized crescent moons, and mythical winged beasts—should form a central, cohesive cluster. Use stark lines, clean silhouettes, and limited palette colors (indigo, teal, gold foil accents) for maximum print pop on apparel. The composition must be centered, ensuring all key details are visible and punchy even when scaled. Emphasize thick outlines and flat graphic design principles, making the image highly vector-print friendly.
